task_completion.description: Navigate to the Risk Register and open the form to create a new risk.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Eramba interface with a 'New Risk', 'Add Risk', or similar creation form open.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified title for the new risk.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Risk: Legacy Payment Server Vulnerabilities' is visible in the title or name input field of the risk creation form.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified description for the new risk.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text containing 'EOL operating system' is visible in the description text area of the risk creation form.

task_completion.description: Assign High Likelihood and High Impact scores to the risk.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Likelihood and Impact fields (or equivalent risk scoring dropdowns/sliders in Eramba) are set to 'High' or their maximum respective values.

task_completion.description: Link the new risk to the original compliance finding.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The compliance finding 'Unpatched Legacy Payment Server' is selected or visible in a linking field, related items tab, or association dropdown within the risk form.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the Eramba GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) navigating the Eramba web application.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or SQL queries to create the risk.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL INSERT commands, curl requests, or scripts interacting with the Eramba database directly.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely filled out and submitted the form in the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show progressive filling of the form fields in the Eramba UI rather than just a text editor with the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must interact with the Eramba GRC web interface. The target compliance finding to link is exactly named 'Unpatched Legacy Payment Server'. The new risk must be titled exactly 'Risk: Legacy Payment Server Vulnerabilities' and its description must include the phrase 'EOL operating system'. The risk must be assigned High Likelihood and High Impact scores, and it must be explicitly linked to the aforementioned compliance finding in the UI.
